text.title: Enterprise XR Applications Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying enterprise-xr-applications; each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: XR-only training launched to 25% of workforce; 75% can't access; rollout stalls.
antipattern.fix: Document procurement plan to >=50% within 6 months OR descope to a 2D-fallback hybrid.

antipattern.symptom: 60-minute training session in VR; trainees report nausea; refusals after week 1.
antipattern.root-cause: Designer transplanted 2D session length to VR.
antipattern.fix: Hard cap 25 min continuous with 5-min break; vestibular-safe motion only.

antipattern.symptom: XR pilot enters year 2 with no ROI metric tracked; budget cut.
antipattern.root-cause: ROI gate skipped at pilot start.
antipattern.fix: Declare baseline + target + measurement before pilot; review quarterly.
